content.seo_title: Deployment Workflow: Scale AI Apps for Students (Checklist)
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with scaling your AI projects. Learn a professional deployment workflow using Antigravity and Claude Code to launch like a senior engineer.
content.answer_block: To scale your AI projects, implement an automated CI/CD pipeline that decouples your application logic from infrastructure. By using Antigravity for environment orchestration and Claude Code for iterative deployment, you eliminate manual configuration errors, ensure consistent build environments, and achieve production-grade reliability with every single commit you push.
content.intro:
You’ve spent weeks crafting the perfect AI model, but when it comes time to deploy, your local environment feels like a fragile house of cards. The dream of a scalable application hits a wall of 'works on my machine' errors and deployment bottlenecks. You aren't failing; you are simply hitting the ceiling of manual development.

Professional deployment isn't about luck; it's about engineering a repeatable system. By integrating Antigravity for infrastructure control and Claude Code for intelligent automation, you transform your workflow from a manual chore into a high-velocity engine. It is time to stop building projects and start launching platforms.

steps.title: Containerize with Antigravity
steps.description: Ensure your environment is identical across development and production by defining your infrastructure as code.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a minimal, secure Dockerfile optimized for a Python-based AI web application, including multi-stage builds to reduce image size.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate a docker-compose.yml file that exposes port 8000 for my current project'

steps.title: Automate Linting and Testing
steps.description: Never deploy broken code again by enforcing quality checks before the build process starts.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure a pre-commit hook that runs flake8 and pytest on all staged files, failing the commit if any test case returns an error.
steps.claude_code_command: claude terminal 'pip install pytest flake8 && pytest tests/'

steps.title: Configure Cloud Deployment Pipeline
steps.description: Connect your repository to a cloud provider using Claude to handle the complex configuration scripts.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a GitHub Actions workflow file that builds the container image and pushes it to a cloud registry upon merging to main.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'create a .github/workflows/deploy.yml file for automated deployment to AWS App Runner'

steps.title: Implement Infrastructure Monitoring
steps.description: Gain visibility into your app's performance to identify bottlenecks before they crash your user experience.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Add basic health check endpoints to my FastAPI app and configure an Antigravity monitoring monitor for memory usage spikes.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'add a /health endpoint to main.py that checks database connectivity'

steps.title: Automated Deployment Verification
steps.description: Finalize your workflow by using automated smoke tests to ensure your production environment is live and functional.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a script that polls the production URL after deployment and alerts if the status code is not 200.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'create a script named verify_deploy.sh that uses curl to check the production endpoint'

pro_tips: Always use environment variables for API keys; never hardcode credentials, even in private repos.
Implement a 'staging' environment that mirrors production exactly to catch configuration bugs early.
Use small, incremental commits to make debugging deployment failures significantly faster.
Keep your Docker images slim by using Alpine or Distroless base images to reduce attack surface and build time.
Automate your database migrations within your CD pipeline to ensure the schema matches the code version.
content.next_steps: After completing this workflow, begin building your next project using this template as a base. Once comfortable, experiment with adding a database layer or an authentication provider to your CI/CD pipeline.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting infrastructure hold back your innovation. Master these deployment patterns, build a bulletproof portfolio, and transition from student to professional developer. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
